generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board temperature sensor capturing real‑time temperature data of the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance PressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board pressure sensor capturing real‑time pressure data of the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PressureDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board velocity sensor capturing real‑time velocity data of the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data transmitted from sensors
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance PressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PressureSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

// C10: Data derived from transmitted data
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time temperature data stream ingested from the TemperatureSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance PressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time pressure data stream ingested from the PressureSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time velocity data stream ingested from the VelocitySensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration routine that updates model parameters using time‑stamped sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm that flags anomalous sensor read‑outs."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller enforcing safety and operational limits."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator that fills missing telemetry based on models."
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimisationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimiser suggesting operational parameter adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimisationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation providing scenario‑based future behaviour predictions."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring enabler that validates safety and performance constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for calibrating geometric, behavioral and analytical models."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs fault detection and generates anomaly alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, AlertAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that enforces supervisory control and triggers corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that estimates system state and enhances telemetry fidelity."
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimisationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that optimises operational parameters for safety and performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimisationRecommendationAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs predictive simulations for scenario planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationOutcomeInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time metrics and supports decision making."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDecisionSupportInsight
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance RealTimeDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time decision support derived from monitored safety and performance metrics."
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updated model parameters and confidence after calibration."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying anomalous sensor read‑outs detected by the fault detection algorithm."
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated corrective command issued by supervisory controller upon safety constraint violation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting the estimated system state derived from the state estimator."
]

instance OptimisationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimisation recommendation suggesting parameter adjustments for safety and performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveSimulationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Outcome of predictive simulation that forecasts future system behaviour."
]

instance AlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert notifying operators of detected safety or performance violations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models
instance MechanicalCADRepresentation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD‑based geometric model capturing spatial attributes of mechanical components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance DynamicPhysicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model describing dynamic physics with differential equations of CPS components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model providing closed‑form relationships for control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SupervisoryControlEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is structured around a data‑centric loop comprising four key layers: a Data acquisition layer that ingests sensor streams and timestamps observations; a Models layer that stores cyber‑physical and environmental knowledge; an Algorithms layer that houses calibration routines, fault detectors, supervisory controllers, state estimators, and optimisers; and a Monitoring module that validates safety and optimality against defined thresholds. In operation, physical sensor data flow into the Data layer, where calibration algorithms adjust model parameters to reflect the current PT state. The updated models then support simulation runs and supervisory control actions, while simultaneously being processed by state estimation and fault detection routines that generate diagnostic signals. These diagnostics feed the Monitoring module, which continuously compares them to safety and performance constraints. If a violation is detected, the system can trigger automated corrective actions via supervisory controllers or raise alerts for human operators to intervene. This orchestration ensures continuous synchronization between the PT and its digital replica, facilitating real‑time optimisation and fault‑tolerant operation."
]
